rationale: In the citing paper, Danaher, Bonfrer, and Dhar (2008) appears only in a grouped footnote citation about an alternative mechanism (adjacent ad placements causing attention spillovers/advertising interaction). The main theory, hypotheses, empirical design, and core results are not built from or directly compared against this specific paper. There is no clear method borrowing, measurement borrowing, or dedicated discussion of its findings beyond background acknowledgment.
